member.name: M:HazinaStore.IntakeRegenerators.ContentHooksRegenerator.BuildProjectContextAsync(System.String,System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Builds project context from analysis fields using IAnalysisFieldsProvider. Loads all configured analysis fields (brand profile, tone of voice, etc.) and extracts their content.

member.name: M:HazinaStore.IntakeRegenerators.ContentHooksRegenerator.GetLanguageInstruction(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the language instruction to append to prompts. Returns empty string if language is English (default) or null/empty.
